series_metadata.series_title: Managed Care Organization (MCO) Report Cards and Supporting Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: The Managed Care Organization Report (MCO) Cards contains MCO performance evaluations and compares results of injured worker and employer surveys for later use for employers during their selection of an MCO.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain these records for 2 years, then retain in the Records Center for 15 years, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain on the BWC server for 17 years, and then destroy. Review the machine readable information every 3 years to ensure that the files can still be accessed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
